title: Double Dragon 13 Amp UK 3-Pin Plug | Heavy-Duty Rewireable Electrical Plug | Durable & Safe PC Flame Retardant Material | BS1363 & BSI Certified | Cord Grip for Secure Wiring (Pack of 2, Black)
features: ✅ BSI Kitemark Certified & Safe: Fully compliant with BS 1363-1:2016 + A1:2018 safety standards and equipped with a BS 1362-certified 13A fuse. Ensures reliable and secure electrical connections for your devices with added protection against overloads.

✅ Premium Quality Material & Fire-Resistant Build: Made with pure copper connectors and a PP flame-retardant shell, resistant to 750°C temperatures. This plug minimizes risks of electrical leakage, overheating, and spontaneous combustion, keeping your devices safe.

✅ Safe, Reliable, and Efficient Protection: The 13A fused 3-pin plug provides protection by automatically disconnecting during power surges, preventing damage to your appliances from high voltage or electrical issues. A critical feature for safety-conscious users.

✅ Compact, Versatile, and Multiple Uses: Lightweight, space-saving design ideal for home, office, and industrial use. This 13A plug is perfect for various devices, from lamps to computers, offering reliable power to all your appliances.

✅ Easy Installation & After-Sales Support: Clear terminal markings (N, E, L) make installation quick and hassle-free. We provide 30-day after-sales service, ensuring a smooth experience, and are always ready to assist with any issues or concerns.
description: The Double Dragon 13 Amp UK 3-Pin Plug is a heavy-duty, rewireable electrical plug made from premium, flame-retardant PC PP material. It’s designed to meet BS 1363-1:2016 + A1:2018 standards, ensuring safe and reliable performance with a BS1362-certified 13A fuse. The pure copper connectors offer efficient power conduction, while the compact design is perfect for home, office, or industrial use. This plug is built for durability, offering protection against overheating, electrical leakage, and fire hazards. With easy installation, clear terminal markings, and a 30-day after-sales support guarantee, it's ideal for everyday electrical needs.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎UK 3-PIN Plug, 13A Fuse, PIN Cover, Wiring Diagram, Wire Shealth
